purpose: settings.abort_on_inconsistency=True on the exact abort-on-inconsistency-default program: the knob is dead at the pin — a full-tree grep finds the name only in _Settings itself (pyreason.py:49 init, :70 reset, :118-123 getter, :284-294 setter; zero hits under scripts/) — so the IPL and same-predicate conflicts resolve identically to the default twin, nothing aborts, and only the knob readback differs (reasoning probe digests matched abort-on-inconsistency-default's at authoring; the harness judges each case within one knob position) — the dead-knob class. The effective inconsistency governor is setting:inconsistency_check.
provenance: spine case against docs/surface.md setting:abort_on_inconsistency dead-knob; inconsistency-ipl-resolve program with the knob set true
